productDisplayName: Hush Puppies Men Gel comfort Black Sandals
description: Crafted from superior leather in a classic design, this Gel Comfort sandals from hush puppies is a perfect blend of comfort and style. The padded straps and footbed, with Gel technology in the heel offer a luxurious feel to the feet. Upper Soft leather straps with padded fabric lining Ergonomically curved leather footbed with Gel bounce technology in the heel for easy movement Outsole TPU outsole with herringbone and horizontal grooves on the forefoot and heel for enhanced grip and traction Flex grooves for easy movement Slipper care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner for the straps if needed Do not store in direct sunlight
